allow: Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command 'try { $p = ConvertTo-SecureString -String '\\'' '\\'' -AsPlainText -Force; Get-PfxData -FilePath '\\''d:/Flutter/flutter projects/khata_management/certs/KhataManagement.pfx'\\'' -Password $p | Select-Object -ExpandProperty EndEntityCertificates | Format-List Subject, Issuer, NotBefore, NotAfter, Thumbprint } catch { Write-Host "ERR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }')
